title: Grilled Chicken Skewers with Minty Greek Sauce
description: Traditional German-inspired skewers marinated in a refreshing minty Greek sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, mint leaves, lemon juice, and olive oil.
2. Add chicken to the marinade and mix well.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.
7. Brush skewers with additional olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
8. Serve hot with minty Greek sauce for dipping.
